app_metadata.name: Maestro EGP
app_metadata.primary_goal: Comprehensive responsiveness overhaul without visual redesign. Maintain dark theme, shadcn/ui components, and Tailwind classes.

page_headers.strategy: Convert rigid row headers to flexible wrap/column layouts on mobile.
page_headers.classes_container: flex flex-col gap-4 items-start w-full md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between
page_headers.classes_actions: flex flex-row flex-wrap gap-2 w-full md:w-auto md:flex-nowrap md:overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar
page_headers.notes: Since there is no shared layout, apply this snippet pattern uniformly across all ~40 pages.

pos_screen_3_pane.desktop: flex flex-row h-screen. Right (logical Start): w-56 fixed sidebar. Center: flex-1 grid-cols-4/5. Left (logical End): w-80 fixed cart panel.
pos_screen_3_pane.tablet_md: flex flex-row h-screen. Right (Start): w-48 fixed sidebar. Center: flex-1 grid-cols-3. Cart: hidden by default, accessible via shadcn/ui Sheet (Slide-over from end).
pos_screen_3_pane.mobile_sm: flex flex-col h-screen. Categories: top horizontal scrollable list (chips). Products: grid-cols-2 flex-1 overflow-y-auto. Cart: hidden, triggered via floating action button (FAB).
pos_screen_3_pane.mobile_categories_classes: flex flex-row w-full overflow-x-auto gap-2 p-2 whitespace-nowrap md:flex-col md:w-56 md:overflow-y-auto
pos_screen_3_pane.mobile_cart_fab: fixed bottom-4 end-4 z-50 rounded-full shadow-lg (shadcn Button size='icon')
pos_screen_3_pane.cart_sheet_mobile: Use shadcn/ui <Sheet> with side='left' (or side='end' depending on RTL implementation) for the Cart panel.

wide_data_tables.strategy: Wrap all tables in a horizontally scrollable container to prevent breaking page layout.
wide_data_tables.alternative: For extremely critical tables on mobile, consider rendering a stacked card view, but overflow-x-auto is the fastest and safest initial conversion.

dense_card_grids.strategy: Fluid grid columns scaling from 1 up to 5 based on screen size.
dense_card_grids.classes: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-4

dialogs_and_modals.strategy: Make dialogs consume most of the screen on mobile, while remaining centered on desktop.
dialogs_and_modals.classes_content: w-[95vw] max-w-[95vw] sm:max-w-lg md:max-w-xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto rounded-xl
dialogs_and_modals.mobile_specific: Ensure action buttons inside dialogs (Save/Cancel) are sticky at the bottom or accessible without excessive scrolling.

settings_long_forms.strategy: Stack label and input fields vertically on mobile. Utilize accordion or tabs to break down the 7.9k line settings page.
settings_long_forms.classes_field_wrapper: flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-2 md:gap-4 md:items-center

delivery_management.tabs_list: flex w-full justify-start overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap no-scrollbar
delivery_management.order_board: flex flex-col gap-4 md:flex-row md:overflow-x-auto snap-x

tailwind_rtl_guidelines.rule: Always use Tailwind logical properties to ensure perfect RTL/LTR flexibility.
tailwind_rtl_guidelines.margins: use ms-* (margin-start), me-* (margin-end) instead of ml-*/mr-*
tailwind_rtl_guidelines.padding: use ps-* (padding-start), pe-* (padding-end) instead of pl-*/pr-*
tailwind_rtl_guidelines.positioning: use start-* and end-* instead of left-*/right-*

implementation_priority: 1. Shared page headers & action clusters (Highest repetition, easiest fix).
2. Reports & Data Tables (Wrap in overflow-x-auto to immediately stop page-breaking).
3. POS Screen Layout (Refactor into Category Chips, Center Grid, Cart Sheet + FAB).
5. Delivery Management (Responsive map height, horizontal scrolling boards).
6. Settings (Convert side-by-side forms to stacked on mobile).

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, tabs, inputs, sheet triggers, FABs) MUST have `data-testid` attributes using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='pos-cart-trigger', data-testid='mobile-menu-trigger').
